last_active_file.section: Persistent Hotspots MVP+ — top-10 command staff one-pager (2024-01-01 → 2026-03-31 horizon)

last_completed_task: Persistent Hotspots MVP+ closeout: built Scripts/t4/persistent_hotspots.py; produced top-10 CSV + command staff one-pager + one-page method/caveats note in Docs/deliverables/; verified CSV<->MD consistency; added trend_90d seasonal-artifact + spatial-enrichment + RMS Feb-stub-resolved caveats to both docs; wrote handoff handoff_20260417_persistent_hotspots_mvp_plus.md.
next_task_in_progress_or_queued: Confidence calibration against outcome data; ArcGIS overlay of top-10 location keys (lat/long + Post/PDZone/Grid spatial join) and publish T4_Persistent_Hotspots_2024_2026_Q1 hosted feature layer into the T4 Dashboard web map.
unresolved_errors_warnings_decisions: trend_90d = down on most top-10 rows is a seasonal artifact at the 2026-03-31 anchor (Jan-Mar 2026 vs Oct-Dec 2025). Not a resolution signal. YoY normalization is a follow-up.
Spatial enrichment (lat/long, Post, PDZone, Grid) not joined to persistent_hotspots top-10 output; use ArcGIS Pro overlay for now.
Address bucketing can split a real hotspot across rows (e.g., '100 Block Main St' vs '100 Main St'); soft-match dedupe deferred.
CAD-side DV filter out of scope — two-layer DV exclusion runs on RMS only; CAD domestic calls remain in the pool (master prompt §6.7 blind spot).
Confidence is a qualitative gate (high/medium/low), not a calibrated probability — calibration vs outcome data is next-iteration.
05_EXPORTS/_RMS/monthly/2026/2026_02_RMS.xlsx upstream stub still 0 bytes; Acute_Crime/Data/rms/monthly/2026_02_RMS.xlsx re-exported 2026-04-16 and used for this run.
Hotspot CSV post/pdzone/grid/latitude/longitude left blank — §5.5 spatial-join fallback deferred.
DV Layer 1 rescue audit shows 0 rescued matches this cycle (data was already clean); plumbing retained for future cycles with legacy case-number forms.
2024_CAD_ALL: ~6% empty disposition vs ~0.15% for 2025 — affects disposition-based rules on 2024 pulls.
Tier 1 scoring ignores disposition until implemented; cad_rms_data_quality DispositionValidator + enhanced_esri mapping are upstream integration targets.
score_integration / persistent_hotspots PATHS hardcoded to OneDrive Acute_Crime — add CLI overrides if running elsewhere.
Imported_from_sandbox/dv_doj_arcgis_exports local only — repair data sources in Pro if paths point to Sandbox.
